card_description: Meister Eckhart (1260-1328). Union of soul with God; apophatic theology
full_description:
Meister Eckhart (1260-1328). Union of soul with God; apophatic theology.

**Category:** Christian Mysticism

**Key segment contexts:**
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick identifies the "Divine Birth" in his soul as the realization of Meister Eckhart's theology, where the "Wise Old Man" (the Father) is born from the mortal man. He rejects the "Suffering Servant...
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick identifies "Possession by God" (Dionysian mystery) as the secret core of Christianity, rediscovered by Meister Eckhart. He reinterprets his 1974 experience as a "recollection" (anamnesis) of h...
